source_description: TOI-3505.01 row copied by Mason from the internship observing-schedule spreadsheet and pasted into the project conversation
scope_note: Only the TOI-3505.01 row is retained. Unrelated rows and participant names from the larger sheet are intentionally omitted.
transcription_note: Column names and cell text below preserve the pasted row. Blank cells remain empty strings.
values: bad RA jumps at the beginning of the night
source_limits: The pasted row does not state a time zone.
The workbook name, URL, revision history, formulas, and cell formatting were not supplied.
The row gives ingress, egress, and period but no epoch, timing uncertainty, depth, or source for those predictions.
Finder Chart is display text; its underlying link target was not present in the pasted data.
